title: ItemFulfillment

remote_id.description: The third-party API ID of the matching object.

created_at.description: The datetime that this object was created by Merge.

modified_at.description: The datetime that this object was modified by Merge.

sales_order.description: The ID of the sales order that the item fulfillment originated from.

fulfillment_date.description: The date the fulfillment was created.

customer.description: The customer associated with the item fulfillment.

company.description: The subsidiary associated with the fulfillment.

status.description: The status of the item fulfillment.

remote_created_at.description: When the third party's item fulfillment was created.

remote_updated_at.description: When the third party's item fulfillment was updated.

remote_was_deleted.description: Indicates whether or not this object has been deleted in the third party platform. Full coverage deletion detection is a premium add-on. Native deletion detection is offered for free with limited coverage. [Learn more](https://docs.merge.dev/integrations/hris/supported-features/).

description:
# The ItemFulfillment Object
### Description
The `ItemFulfillment` object represents the recorded shipment or delivery of some or all items on an associated sales order.

### Usage Example
Fetch from the `LIST ItemFulfillments` endpoint and view a company's item fulfillments.
